form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 8 at this track on March 26 over 1609m, 2.5 len behind Outofquemado with 56kg at $4.40. Before that didn't finish the race at this track March 10 over 1308m. Not far away last time. In the mix again.

form.formComment: Last start sat on the speed and boxed on steadily second last of 7 at this track on March 19 over 1006m, 7 len behind The Scent carrying 54kg at $37.80. The race before that raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 9 at this track on March 5 over 1006m, 6 len behind Chicken Wing with 56kg at $40.30. Rather invest elsewhere.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign when last of 9 at this track April 30 over 1308m, 23 len behind Peaceful Waters with 55.5kg at $100. Previously first up; ran last of 9 at this track April 1 2025 over 1106m, 18 len behind Pepper Jack carrying 58kg at $63. Hard to recommend.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of ten weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign fourth of 7 at Los Alamitos Qh February 1 over 905m, 3.5 len behind Mischief's King with 56kg at $6.70. When resuming last campaign third of 9 at The Albuquerque Downs Racetrack & Casino September 24 2023 over 1006m, 1.3 len behind Rochester's Finest with 55.5kg at $4. Can run a good race despite the gap between runs.
